Amazon Europe Price Compare by comparizon.eu
Compare and discover the best deals effortlessly across European Amazon stores and find the best deals. 🌍💰

🛍️ Comparizon.eu: Simplify Your Shopping Across European Amazon Stores! 🌍

Welcome to Comparizon.eu, the Chrome extension that turns your European Amazon shopping into a breeze! We believe in keeping things simple while empowering you to snag the best deals effortlessly.

Why Choose Comparizon.eu?
🧐 Effortless Price Comparisons: Say farewell to tedious manual price comparisons across European Amazon stores. With Comparizon.eu, a neatly organized price comparison table, including shipping costs, is at your fingertips right on the product page. Easily compare prices, including shipping, from different Amazon stores and make confident buying decisions.

📊 Sleek and Informative Design: Our extension offers a sleek price and shipping comparison interface that keeps things focused on the essentials. The comparison table displays prices, including shipping, from various European Amazon stores, making it a breeze to spot the best deals. No more clutter—just smart choices.

🛒 Seamless Shopping: We're all about a smooth shopping experience. Comparizon.eu seamlessly integrates into the product page, granting you instant access to price and shipping comparisons without any hassle. Enjoy your shopping journey without interruptions or distractions.

🌐 European Amazon Stores Covered: Comparizon.eu has your back across a wide range of European Amazon stores. Explore options from various countries with automatic and daily updated conversion rates. Maximize your savings, and see the full cost upfront.

Join Us: Simplify your European Amazon shopping, one deal at a time.

🌟 Key Features:

Effortless price and shipping comparison
Clean and focused presentation
Seamless shopping experience
Support for numerous European Amazon stores
Important Note: For accurate shipping prices, please ensure you are logged into the specific Amazon region. Shipping costs may vary based on your location and account settings.

Ready to supercharge your European shopping adventure? Join Comparizon.eu today and shop smarter across borders!

🛒 Download our extension Now!

comparizon.eu is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon. SmartContact Agent Lite es la extensión de agente de la solución omnicanal Cloud Contact Center SmartContact.

Principales funcionalidades:
•	Sistema de control de acceso (log in/out)
•	Gestión de llamadas
•	Control de estado (activo/inactivo, pausas)
•	Control de Mute y llamada en espera
•	Agendas
•	Función de aviso de contacto o Descuelgue automático

•	Botón para activar grabación (en modalidad bajo demanda)

•	Tipificación de conversaciones
•	Historial de llamadas. Sección donde visualizar las conversaciones realizadas
•	Sección de visualización de los KPI’s propios del agente

The free Blocksi AI Web Filter for Chrome ensures safe browsing by blocking sites, apps, and content—all in the cloud.

Free Blocksi AI Web Filter provides a powerful web filtering solution for Chrome browsers, promoting a safe and distraction-free browsing experience. Since 2011, the free Blocksi extension has been a trusted solution for web and YouTube filtering, internet access management, and safer home and school browsing.

Blocksi’s AI Web Filter is fast, reliable, and has a proven track record across numerous school districts, homes, businesses, and government organisations.

Schedule a demo to find out more at www.blocksi.net.

Offered by Blocksi @ www.blocksi.net

Key Features:

- Web filtering across 85+ categories, including adult content, security risks, and malware
- YouTube filtering with over 30 categories to block inappropriate content
- Channel and keyword-based YouTube filtering for more precise content moderation
- Enforcing Safe Search for text, images, and videos across leading search engines
- Content filtering that analyzes web pages and blocks based on detected keywords
- Customisable Blacklist/Whitelist for website access control
- Application filters for services like Google Docs, Google Classroom, Netflix, and more
- Time-based access controls to manage screen time effectively

Show size summaries of GitHub repos

- 🔍 See the total size of repositories
- 📁 See sizes of all individual folders and files
- 🔑 Even works with your own private repositories!*

Ever found yourself wishing to know the size of a repository without having to clone it first? Your wish is granted! This extension brings you a handy summary of the repository's size and its contents, all accessible directly from the repository's home page.

🚧 No More API Worries 🚧
This extension uses GitHub's API to fetch the sizes of repositories! Due to its default rate limit, this extension features a one-click Authentication service to ensure you can make all the necessary requests without any fuss.

🔑 Explore Your Private Repositories 🔑
*Get insights into your own private repositories with ease! Just utilize a GitHub Personal Access Token and the size details of your private repositories are just a few clicks away. To delve into the authentication settings, simply pin the extension and tap to open its interface! The tokens can be generated on GitHub.

🔐 Your Data Stays Yours 🔐
Your email and Personal Access Tokens are utilized solely to facilitate seamless functionality and authenticate your sessions - they're never shared, used for marketing, or accessed for any other purpose.

🌐 Open Source Code 🌐
Our code is open for inspection, use, and contribution. We believe in transparent development and welcome enhancements from the community. Browse, utilize, or improve upon our work at your leisure, and shape the way this extension evolves by bringing your own expertise and perspective.

Link to the code:
https://github.com/AminoffZ/github-repo-size
Optimize Amazon and Walmart sales with real-time data insights. Make smarter decisions now to boost your business performance.

Maximize your Amazon and Walmart selling potential with Sellify.

Sellify is the Chrome extension built for serious marketplace sellers, including Amazon FBA, Amazon FBM, Walmart WFS, and Walmart MFN. It gives you clear data, accurate estimates, and fast insights so you can focus on profitable products instead of guesswork.

Sellify provides the data and infrastructure needed to find Walmart and Amazon opportunities across Wholesale, Online Arbitrage, Retail Arbitrage, and Private Label.

Key Features

Detailed Analytics
Gain in-depth insights into product profitability. Our extension provides scenario analysis, offering a clear view of potential outcomes based on different strategies. With accurate fee breakdowns and calculations, you can understand all costs involved, ensuring precise profit estimations.

Accurate Estimated Sales
View clean estimated sales for Amazon and Walmart to understand demand, plan inventory, and prioritize higher impact products.

Advanced Seller Table and Insights
Break down the competition with our seller table. Check stock levels, seller history, and how often sellers rotate in and out so you can judge how stable or aggressive the competition really is.

Competitor Overview
See who is selling the item, how many sellers you are up against, and what their pricing looks like. Use this to decide when to enter, when to pass, and how to price confidently.

Market Analytics Across Channels
Compare products on Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Google, and other major retailers. Spot gaps in pricing, availability, and demand to uncover new sourcing ideas.

AI Powered Smart Matcher
Match products across Walmart and Amazon with AI support. Get a clear view of how an item performs on each marketplace using rich data that is ready to act on.

Historical Market Data
Review average prices and key trends over ranges like 90 days and 180 days. Use real history instead of hunches when making buying and pricing decisions.

Advanced Product data
View important product details such as model number, UPC, and manufacturer information so you can verify matches and vet deals quickly.

Online Arbitrage Sourcing
Use the Sellify Product Explorer to discover profitable products while you browse online retailers. Scan through large catalogs and send the winners straight into your workflow.

Additional Features

Google Sheets Exporting for Lead Generation
Send items straight into Google Sheets with one click. Reorder or hide columns, add notes, and manage leads the way you want. Your data stays in your sheet, fully organized and easy to work with over time.

Profitability Analysis
Track and review the profit potential of your items and focus your time and capital on the products that actually move the needle.

Accurate Fee Calculation
See clear fee breakdowns for Walmart and Amazon so you understand your true costs, including for Amazon FBA.

Comprehensive Seller Insights
Understand how crowded a listing is, how stocked competitors are, and how that may affect your chances at the Buy Box or top offers.

Smart Market Comparison
Compare pricing and demand across platforms to decide where each item fits best in your portfolio.

Advanced Buy Box Intelligence
Monitor Buy Box status, pricing signals, and suppression alerts so you can adjust strategy before you lose important placement.

Multi Functional Tools
Use built in AI tools to cut down the time you spend on research, matching, and manual checks.

Catalog Integration
Add items straight from the extension into your catalog or system. Keep your sourcing, analysis, and workflow connected in one place.

Test Authoring extension for the Provar test automation tool.  It helps testers build test cases interactively by:

1.  Adding the "Add to Test Case" right-click menu.  This populates the Test Builder panel with the details of the field or button that was clicked-on.  They can click "Add" or "Add & Do" to add the appropriate test step.

2.  Shows visual highlighting to confirm that field locators (e.g. XPath or CSS) in Test Builder match the intended field or button on the page.

3.  The extension creates a new tab under certain circumstances to solve issues relating to certain versions of chromedriver.

You should install this if:

1.  You are a Provar user (see https://provar.com/)

2.  Your company's security policy prohibits the use of unpackaged chrome extensions.

Customizable Buttons to Skip Forward/Rewind and Seek Through videos on YouTube.

• Adjust fast forward and rewind intervals to suit your preferences.
• Choose whether to override your keyboard's arrow/J+L keys.
• Skip at your own pace: set a custom delay between each skip event and execution timing.
• The buttons blend right into the player by using youtube's UI style.
• Instant Sync Across Tabs: Any changes you make to the skip intervals and seek through values are instantly applied across all open youtube tabs.
• Automatic Save: Your custom settings are saved automatically in your browser's local storage, so you don't have to set them every time.

Note: 
• Please be aware that settings saved in your browser's local storage may be cleared if you clear your browser's cache or cookies. 
• Skip intervals are adjustable in seconds, with a maximum limit of 99 seconds.
• Seek through values are adjustable in milliseconds, with the min/max limits stated under each setting.
• Keyboard override setting is OFF by default.
• If you are experiencing issues with the popup not hiding along with the rest of the elements after your mouse leaves the player, enable the new setting for injecting the buttons outside the player until it is fixed. They will be injected next to the subscribe button.

Suggest features or report bugs/issues to kunovpreslav@gmail.com

MultiField CopyCat - Copy, Paste & Autofill Forms Instantly
Copy, paste & autofill multiple form fields instantly. Saves hours on repetitive form filling, data entry & QA testing.

Tired of filling the same forms? MultiField CopyCat is a form-filler chrome extension that lets you bulk copy, paste, and autofill form fields instantly. Drag to select fields to copy and paste them into another form in seconds. Save form data once for future autofills. Save time and energy with every web form! 🐱⚡

⭐ Benefits 🐾
-------------------------
⏱️✨ Save time filling forms – Skip typing every field! Copy, paste & autofill forms in seconds
🚀✨ Boost productivity – Do more in less time for work, testing, or data entry
🧠✨ Reduce mental & physical fatigue – Free yourself from wrist fatigue & brain draining repetitive typing
☕✨ Relax while we work – Enjoy more breaks while your forms are pasted instantly or filled automatically
🔒✨ Privacy first – Your data stays local. We never share or sell your information
🐱✨ A cat companion in your browser – Pin Meow Meow to your toolbar for a cute productivity buddy 

⚡ Key Features 🐾
-------------------------
📄✨ Copy & paste form fields in selected area – Drag over target area to copy or paste multiple fields at once
📋✨ Copy & paste all form data on page – Grab all form data with 1 button click. Paste them wherever needed. Perfect for data migration or repeated entries
🧠✨ Smart Match available – Attempt to match fields automatically when pasting, even when form fields aren't in the same order (works best with standard web forms)
🔀✨ Two Paste modes – Use default Sequential Mode for forms with identical layouts (Smart Match off), or Smart Match Mode to match fields for forms with different field positions (toggle in the extension popup)
🏄✨ Auto-Scroll Dragbox (Pro) – Drag your selection area beyond the visible screen, and the page scrolls automatically. Perfect for copying/pasting between long forms or CMS pages
🐱✨ Smart autofill – Save & reuse your form data with instant autofill. Great for repetitive tasks, or saving draft copies on web entries
✌️✨ Apply saved form values on current page – Use 'Apply Autofill' button to instantly fill current page using a selected saved form setting
⚙️✨ Full control over autofill – Easily toggle autofill on or off for each saved setting 
💎✨ Custom field group setup in Smart Match (Pro) – Create custom field groups, allowing fields with similar meanings to match across different websites for maximum flexibility
🗂️✨ Save multiple form sets per autofill setting (Pro) – Easily switch between different saved form sets under one autofill setting
⏱️✨ Custom autofill delay for slow-loading pages (Pro) – Ensure autofill applies at the right timing on dynamic or slow websites
🛠️✨ Edit & manage saved settings – Update field values, or edit URL patterns to extend autofill on more pages
💳✨ Built-in Stripe checkout autofill – Instantly fill out Stripe test-mode checkouts. Perfect for developers & QA testers
⌨️✨ Customizable keyboard shortcuts – Use default hotkeys or define your own for a lightning-fast workflow
🧩✨ Supports all standard fields – Works seamlessly with text inputs, checkboxes, radio buttons, dropdowns, content-editable fields, and more
📊✨ Usage insights – Check performed action counts & time saved, right from the profile page (click the cat in the popup 🐱)
🔒✨ Privacy-first storage – All data stays local on your device. We connect only to our official site to verify login/subscription status

⭐ How It Works 🐾  
-------------------------  
MultiField CopyCat lets you copy, paste, and autofill form fields on any webpage in seconds.

📄✨ Copy form data in selected area – Press Alt+C / Option+C to start copy mode, then drag to select fields
📋✨ Paste form data in selected area – Press Alt+V / Option+V to start paste mode, then drag to paste into fields
📄✨ Copy all form data on page – Press Alt+Shift+C / Option+Shift+C 
📋✨ Paste all form data on page – Press Alt+Shift+V / Option+Shift+V
🧠✨ Smart match vs default sequential mode during paste – Switch modes via the 'Enable Smart Match' button in the extension popup. Default Sequential Mode pastes fields in the same order as copied, perfect for identical form layouts. Smart Match Mode helps automatically match fields based on form field similarity when field order differs
🐱✨ Save autofill setting – Fill out a form as usual, then press Alt+A / Option+A to save it. Next time you visit, forms will be autofilled instantly on page load. You can also manually apply saved form values on the current page at any time from the extension popup
✅✨ All actions are accessible via buttons in the extension popup
✅✨ Works on all standard form fields – text inputs, textareas, checkboxes, radio buttons, dropdowns, and more

You can manage saved autofill settings, toggle autofill on/off, or view usage stats from the extension popup or options page.  
📘 For a step-by-step guide, check out our Onboarding Guide: https://multifield-copycat.com/get-started

💡 If the default shortcuts don't work, they may be overridden by other extensions. You can check & update them in chrome://extensions/shortcuts and try again. Or checkout our Onboarding Guide on how to customize shortcuts.

⭐ Popular Use Cases 🐾
-------------------------
💼✨ Admin & operations staff – Speed through repetitive form entries for CRMs, dashboards, and internal tools  
🛒✨ E-commerce managers – Manage product listings, inventory, or vendor forms in CMS with less manual typing
💻✨ Developers, QA testers & project managers – Instantly autofill test forms, replicate bug reports, migrate form data across environments, and speed up form-heavy testing
✍️✨ Content editors & marketers – Reuse content or metadata across CMS forms and SEO tools, or save draft copies in web forms with autofill
🧑‍💼✨ HR teams & job seekers – Prefill job application forms, or copy candidate data without retyping  
👨‍💻👩‍💻✨ Everyone – Stop wasting time on copy-paste loops. Save effort on any form, anywhere

⭐ All Plans 🐾
-------------------------
💛✨ Free 
– 10 copy & paste actions per week
– Unlimited autofill usage with up to 3 saved settings

💝✨ Pro 
– Unlimited copy & paste actions 
– Unlimited autofill usage without restrictions
– Auto-Scroll Dragbox for copying & pasting fields beyond the viewport
– Custom field group setup in Smart Match
– Save multiple form sets per autofill setting
– Custom autofill delay for slow-loading pages
– Priority support

🔒 Privacy & Security 🐾
-------------------------
We respect your privacy — MultiField CopyCat does not track your browsing activity or collect any personal information. All data is stored locally in your browser. While no encryption is applied, we recommend avoiding the storage of sensitive data like passwords or credit card numbers when using autofill.

📧 Contact us 🐾
-------------------------
Need help, got a feature idea or find out any issues? Please contact us via email at contact@multifield-copycat.com or join our Discord listed on our official site for support

⭐ Get Started Today ⭐
-------------------------
Say goodbye to repeat form entry! Install MultiField CopyCat now and experience lightning-fast workflow 🐱⚡

⭐ Other Links 🐾
-------------------------
🐱✨ Official Site: https://multifield-copycat.com/
📘✨ Onboarding Guide: https://multifield-copycat.com/get-started
🚀✨ Changelog: https://multifield-copycat.com/changelog
🔒✨ Privacy Policy: https://multifield-copycat.com/privacy-policy
📜✨ Terms of Service: https://multifield-copycat.com/terms-of-service
🧡✨ Follow us on X: https://x.com/MFcopycat
CoCites adds a one-click button in PubMed to show frequently co-cited articles

CoCites is an entirely new method for searching scientific literature. The method finds and ranks articles that are frequently cited together with a selected article. Articles that are frequently cited together tend to be of similar topics. CoCites finds co-cited articles and presents a ranking of most frequently co-cited articles. CoCites is ideal for students, as well as for scientists interested in topics outside their field of expertise—it helps them find relevant literature without the struggle of finding or even knowing the right keywords. This browser extension adds CoCites buttons to articles in PubMed and Google Scholar. One click shows the articles that are frequently cited together with the selected article. No registration is needed unless you want to export the search results. Read below about the permission that CoCites needs to install the extension. After you install the browser extension, the tool is ready for use. Go to PubMed or Google Scholar and CoCites is already working for you. For more information about the method and download, visit www.cocites.com. Further information: If you have any questions, email us at info@cocites.com. Why we need the permission? We ask permission to: Read and change all your data on the websites you visit We need to read your data to find out: - when you visit the PubMed and Google Scholar webpages. Many users visit PubMed within their university environments. The URLs of PubMed vary. We need to read your browser activity to recognize the URL of your PubMed. - for which articles you want a CoCites search button. We need to read the data on the PubMed or Google Scholar page to find out for which articles you want a CoCites search button. We don’t store any of your information or browser history. The university-specific URL of PubMed is temporarily stored in a session cookie, which is deleted after you close the browser.

Goodscouter: Product Comparison, Price Search & Similar Items Finder
Compare products, explore similar items across 90+ shopping websites.

# Product Comparison for Online Shopping

Goodscouter is a Chrome extension that helps users compare prices, explore similar products and discover related items across 90+ shopping websites.

While browsing a product page, Goodscouter can help you discover related listings, compare prices across stores and research products from different marketplaces.

---

# Key Features

🔍 Compare prices and products across supported shopping websites

💸 Find cheaper alternatives and similar product listings

🔎 Explore similar and related product listings

🛍️ Cross-store product and price discovery in a simple side panel

🌍 International and cross-region shopping research

💱 Multi-currency support for easier comparison

🌐 Multi-language interface and search support

🧰 Filter results by store, region and price range

📌 Save and organize products for later review

⚡ Lightweight Chrome side panel experience

🔒 Privacy-friendly design focused on product comparison functionality

---

# Supported Websites

Goodscouter supports a wide range of shopping websites and online marketplaces. Supported websites, product categories and available results may vary depending on region and availability.

---

# Common Use Cases

• Compare prices and product offers across stores

• Explore similar products and alternatives

• Find cheaper alternatives and similar items online

• Research products across international marketplaces

• Review pricing differences between regions

• Organize products while shopping online

Goodscouter helps users search products across websites, compare prices between stores and discover similar products online through a lightweight Chrome extension experience.

# Permissions

Goodscouter only requests the permissions required to read product information from supported pages and display comparison results inside the Chrome side panel.

---

# Important Information

Goodscouter helps users review publicly available product listings from supported websites. Product availability, pricing, shipping fees, taxes and seller information may change over time and should always be verified directly on the retailer's website before purchase.

All trademarks and brand names belong to their respective owners. Goodscouter is an independent tool and is not affiliated with or endorsed by any retailer or marketplace.

Extension for saving media from Instagram's web version

Easy Saver will help you to easily download photos, videos and live streams from your or your friend's account. It adds download button on all media of web version of Instagram.

Using this extension, you can download photos and videos from your feed, from your friend's profile, or from your own profile with one click. You can download reels, stories, and even whole carousel posts.

Easy Saver creates "easy-saver-folder" in your Download folder. All videos and photos will be saved in subfolders like this: "%Downloads_folder%\easy-saver-folder\%friends_username%\", so it will be very easy to sort photos from different accounts.

After the download is finished download button will blink green, if it was successful, or red if it wasn't. (usually because it's a private video or because you cancel the download yourself)

New feature🔥🔥🔥: now you can record Instagrams live stream which is currently online. Open streams page, find record panel, click "Start recording" button. That's it. The stream will be recorded and saved automatically at the end. Or you can click "Stop and save" button and currently recorded part of a live stream will be saved right away. While the stream is being recorded you can minimize the recording panel and continue to browse the Instagram. Yes, you can leave live stream page and browse your feed, stream will be recorded anyway (But don't reload Instagram page with browser reload button, it would stop the recording. Basically, if you see a recording panel then the stream is being recorded) You can record 🔥several streams simultaneously🔥 in one tab. Just open the other stream you want to record and another record panel will be added. At the end of the stream you will receive two files: one with video .m4v, one with audio .m4a. Extension can't merge these files by itself, but you can use video player (VLC for example) to open video and add an audio track. Or you can use "ffmpeg" program to merge these files into one video file (I prefer this way) Or you can find some online service to merge it, it's up to you.

Note, that if you want Chrome to automatically download photos, you need 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' option to be turned off, otherwise it will ask you where to save every single photo. It's not bad, but it's not as convenient as originally intended.

And don't forget, that all videos and photos belong to their creators. Don't download it without the owner's permission.
